skeleton_openui:
root = Stack([hero], "column")
hero_title = TextContent(":hero.title")
hero_body = TextContent(":hero.body")
hero = Card([hero_title, hero_body])
paraphrases: Compose a vertically arranged hero card with :hero.title and :hero.body.
Build one hero surface that presents :hero.title before :hero.body.
Lay out a single hero card in a column using :hero.title and :hero.body.

ladder.L1: A card with two text content elements.
ladder.L2: Create one card with a title and body.
ladder.L3: Design a focused hero card for a product.
ladder.L4: I need a focused introduction card.

edits.instruction: Place :hero.body before :hero.title within the hero card.
